title: Expose lifecycle mutations through the dashboard
description: Add dashboard API and UI controls for the finalized task and issue lifecycle operations while displaying declared status, derived readiness, blockers, rich issue context, and the selected ledger root.
acceptance: Dashboard API routes expose task create, update, set-status, and reopen plus issue show, update, and close as thin core wrappers.
Task and issue detail views display declared status, derived readiness/blockers, lifecycle actions, and preserved issue context.
Controls disable or explain invalid actions and render coded CommandResult errors safely.
Dashboard tests cover API mutation effects, client error states, root disclosure, and representative invalid transitions.
Neither dashboard server routes nor client code writes canonical JSON directly.
notes: Dashboard UX polish unrelated to lifecycle correctness remains Phase 11.
